title: AFFORDABLE HOUSING - 211info
text: RELAY RESOURCES AFFORDABLE HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides affordable and low-income rental housing. Approval of application is based on individual income and rental history. Some properties operate from a waitlist and some are available on a first-come, first-served basis. Properties outside of Multnomah County are limited. 5312 NE 148th Avenue Portland, OR 97230 Eligibility: 50%-60% or less of Area Median Income depending on property Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 223-6327 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 223-6327 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for information FEES: An application fee may apply for some properties DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, proof of income, additional documents may be requested for leasing process LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah and Wasco Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. Campus is closed to the general public. Services: Low Cost Home Rental Listings Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - ABILIT PROGRAM EMPLOYMENT - COMPETITIVE INTEGRATED EMPLOYMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. RELAY RESOURCES
